name: summary-job-persistence-refactor
title: Summary job persistence refactor
creator: panden
notes: Implemented shared summary job execution for manual and scheduled jobs. Summary results are persisted before cursor advancement, and Telegram/private relay delivery is no longer required for job success in this child. Validation: compileall passed; summary job tests 6 passed; web summary job/history API tests 6 passed; web groups + runtime config tests 14 passed; persistence integration tests 4 passed; web lint/build passed with existing Vite chunk-size warning.
